[category]
matching
[prompt]
In Alice's Wonderland, secret processing rules are used on text.

x: not matched anywhere
y: matched but wrong position

0 0000010010 2
1 1011000000 3
2 0000000001 1
3 0001000001 2
4 0000010010 2
5 1011000000 3
6 0000000000 a
7 0000000000 a
